privileged_info_summary: The task creates a denormalized 'InvoiceReport' table from the real Chinook digital music store database (from lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository). The source InvoiceLine table contains exactly 2240 rows, matching the expected_row_count metadata. The table requires 14 columns derived by joining 8 Chinook tables (InvoiceLine, Invoice, Customer, Employee, Track, Album, Artist, Genre, MediaType). All spot-check values are verified in the source data: 'Iron Maiden' (Artist, 140 occurrences), 'Rock' (Genre), and 'MPEG audio file' (MediaType). The database is not synthetic—it is the authoritative Chinook sample database used widely for SQL training and testing.
